## Summary

<!-- What changed and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, tokens, private IPs, or local paths in the diff
- [ ] No real user data in fixtures
- [ ] New dependencies justified (or none)
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`, `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`, `cargo test --all-features` pass locally
- [ ] If touching `.github/` or `.pre-commit-config.yaml`, intent documented above
